title: 3D Character Concept AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable fantasy character concept with fantasy character concept card with clear identity, signature prop, world cues, and cohesive illustration finish. One complete 3D illustration, editorial exaggerated cartoon style, single standalone image, not a storyboard or multi-panel layout. Central. character: a cartoon figure with a tiny head, chubby round torso, super-long limbs, huge hands and bulky shoes, slightly off-balance, caught; The silhouette reads like a soft toy sculpture - plump, springy, and exaggerated, not anatomically realistic; Color: vibrant dopamine palette, high saturation, strong color contrasts, large bold flat fills - vivid but not neon-overexposed. Character Identity: adult moon-water guardian woman with flowing translucent sleeves. World Setting: misty oriental fantasy lake shrine at dawn with floating petals and carved stone steps. Signature Prop: glowing water ribbon orbiting one hand and a jade hair ornament. Style Direction: high-end 3D CG fantasy portrait with detailed fabric, skin, and atmospheric depth. Palette: jade green, moonlit blue, pearl white, and warm gold rim light. Pose Or Expression: quiet direct gaze, one hand lifted, elegant and powerful rather than seductive. Subject: Make adult moon-water guardian woman with flowing translucent sleeves the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in misty oriental fantasy lake shrine at dawn with floating petals and carved stone steps. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use character-first concept framing with strong silhouette, signature prop or power effect, and readable face/body pose. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in high-end 3D CG fantasy portrait with detailed fabric, skin, and atmospheric depth. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use jade green, moonlit blue, pearl white, and warm gold rim light. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.
